output.summary: Fixed missing spacing between filters and cards in the editor preview by adding className prop to FilteredServerSideRender component. This recreates the .archive-inner element's grid layout classes that are stripped when the component extracts innerHTML.

fixesApplied.description: Added className prop to FilteredServerSideRender to replicate the .archive-inner element's classes in the editor
changes: Line 161-163: Changed from single-line <FilteredServerSideRender querySelector=".archive-inner" /> to multi-line with className prop
Added className="archive-inner grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-4" to match the PHP template's .archive-inner element classes
fixesApplied.rationale: The FilteredServerSideRender component extracts the innerHTML (not outerHTML) of the querySelector target element ('.archive-inner'), which strips the element itself and its classes. The wrapper <div> that FilteredServerSideRender renders has no className by default, so the gap-gap-4 spacing between the filter bar and results grid was missing in the editor. By passing className='archive-inner grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-4' to FilteredServerSideRender, the wrapper <div> receives these classes and the editor preview matches the frontend structure.
fixesApplied.pattern: This follows the established pattern in other blocks: TestimonialsCarousel uses className='swiper-parent overflow-hidden relative', DynamicContentCarousel uses className='swiper-parent overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1', Form uses className='form-section-form'.

syncStatus.notes: TSX editor preview now matches PHP frontend structure. The .archive-inner wrapper with grid layout and gap-gap-4 spacing is present in both contexts.

testPage.note: Test page already has 11 Archive variations. No test page changes needed for this fix.

notes: FilteredServerSideRender extracts innerHTML from the querySelector target, stripping the target element itself
The className prop on FilteredServerSideRender is passed through to the wrapper <div> that contains the extracted content
The PHP template has: <div class='archive-inner grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-4'>...
Without className, editor rendered: <div>... (no grid, no gap)
With className, editor renders: <div class='archive-inner grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-4'>... (matches PHP)
The gap-gap-4 class provides vertical spacing between the filter bar and the results grid
The grid grid-cols-1 classes establish a single-column grid layout for the filter bar and results to stack vertically
Build passes without errors, ready for QA verification

editorChecks: Open test page in WordPress editor at https://ign.localhost/wp-admin/post.php?post=118&action=edit
Verify spacing between filter bar and results grid matches the frontend
The gap between filters and cards should be gap-gap-4 (24px at default, responsive)
Compare editor preview to frontend rendering - spacing should match exactly
visualChecks: Filter bar and results grid should be stacked in a single column
Vertical spacing between filter bar and results should be visible and consistent
No layout regression - all other Archive block features should render correctly
